name: testWaitForScopePerformFieldLengthMeasurement
title: testWaitForScopePerformFieldLengthMeasurement
syntax: long testWaitForScopePerformFieldLengthMeasurement (frFrame msg, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, dword bitStartNo, dword bitEndNo, qword fieldLength ScopeAnalyseHandle handle);
description: Returns the number of bits are contained within the defined range and the length of this range.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: The message where the field length should be measured.

parameters.name: msgFieldStart
parameters.description: Defines the start of the measurement range.

parameters.name: msgFieldEnd
parameters.description: Defines the end of the measurement range.

parameters.name: bitStartNo
parameters.description: The bit within the start field where the measurement starts.

parameters.name: bitEndNo
parameters.description: The bit within the end field where the measurement ends.

parameters.name: fieldLength
parameters.description: Returns the length of the defined range.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
